var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={

JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
p=result.match(/共(\d+)页:/)

list=[({text:"第1页",href:baseUrl})]

if(p==null){}else{for(i=2;i<=p[1];i++){
	list.push({text:"第"+i+"页",href:baseUrl.replace(/\.html/,"_"+i+".html")})
}}
list
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
var discover = [];
var showR18 = false;
var push = (title, url, style) => {
    discover.push({
        title: title,
        url: url,
        style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: style
        }
    });
};
var addSlots = (count, style) => {
    var remainder = count % 3;
    var slotsAdd = remainder === 0 ? 0 : 3 - remainder;
    for (var i = 0; i < slotsAdd; i++) {
        push("", null, style);
    }
};
push("书架", null, 1);
try {
    var favored = java.ajax(`${baseUrl}/api/user/favored`);
    if (favored.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    	   showR18 = false;
        push("账号未登录", null, 0.25);
        addSlots(1, 0.25);
    } else {
    	   showR18 = true;
    	   push("阅读历史", "/api/user/read-history?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30", 0.25);
        var favoredData = JSON.parse(favored).favoredWeb;
        favoredData.forEach(item => {
            push(item.title, `/api/user/favored-web/${item.id}?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=update`, 0.25);
        });
        addSlots(1 + favoredData.length, 0.25);
    }
} catch (e) {
	   showR18 = false;
    push("未知错误", null, 0.25);
    addSlots(1, 0.25);
}
push("来源", null, 1);
var providers = ["全部", "kakuyomu", "syosetu", "novelup", "hameln", "pixiv", "alphapolis"];
providers.forEach(provider => {
    var url = provider === "全部" ? 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${providers.slice(1).join('%2C')}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0` : 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${provider}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(provider, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(providers.length, 0.25);
push("类型", null, 1);
var types = ["全部", "连载中", "已完结", "短篇"];
types.forEach((type, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=${index}&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(type, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(types.length, 0.25);
push("分级", null, 1);
var levels = showR18 ? ["全部", "一般向", "R18"] : ["全部", "一般向"];
levels.forEach((level, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=${index}&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(level, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(levels.length, 0.25);
push("排序", null, 1);
var sorts = ["更新", "点击"];
sorts.forEach((sort, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=${index}`;
    push(sort, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(sorts.length, 0.25);
JSON.stringify(discover);
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
var login = () => {
    var username = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号");
    var password = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码");
    var res = java.post(
        `${baseUrl.replace('n', 'auth')}/api/v1/auth/login`,
        JSON.stringify({
            username: username,
            password: password,
            app: "legado"
        }),
        {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    );
    source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({
        Authorization: `Bearer ${res.body()}`
    }));
}
login();
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var initUrl = book.bookUrl;
var url = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? initUrl : initUrl.replace('/novel/', '/api/novel/');
var body = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? result : java.ajax(url);
if (body.includes('ID不合适，应当使用')) {
    var match = body.match(/\/\w+\/[\w-]+/);
    url = `${book.origin}/api/novel${match}`;
    body = java.ajax(url);
}
if (body.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    java.toast("当前会话已失效，请重新登录");
}
java.put('url', url);
body;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
var value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
var data = JSON.parse(result);
var cnIntro = data.introductionZh;
var jpIntro = data.introductionJp;
var intro = cnIntro ? (value === '5' ? jpIntro : ['6', '8'].includes(value) ? cnIntro + "\n‎\n" + jpIntro : ['7', '9'].includes(value) ? jpIntro + "\n‎\n" + cnIntro : cnIntro) : jpIntro;
var timeStamp = '{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' || '{{$.syncAt}}';
intro = '  📬最近' + ('{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' ? '更新' : '同步') + '：' + java.timeFormat(timeStamp * 1000) + '\n‎\n' + intro;
intro;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name:
<js>
var value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
var data = JSON.parse(result);
var name = value === '5' ? data.titleJp : data.titleZh || data.titleJp;
name;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var token = source.getLoginHeader();
update(baseUrl, token);
var value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
var get = /^[1-9]$/.test(value) ? value : '1';
var config = {
    1: 'sakuraParagraphs',
    2: 'gptParagraphs',
    3: 'youdaoParagraphs',
    4: 'baiduParagraphs',
    5: 'paragraphs'
};
var data = JSON.parse(result);
var content = data[config[get]] || data[config[1]] || data[config[2]] || data[config[3]] || data[config[4]] || data[config[5]];
if (['6', '7', '8', '9'].includes(get)) {
    var cnContent = data[config[1]] || data[config[2]] || data[config[3]] || data[config[4]];
    var jpContent = data[config[5]];
    if (cnContent) {
        if (['8', '9'].includes(get)) {
            var res = java.post(
                'https://static.kksk.io/api/kanji',
                JSON.stringify({"content": format(regex(jpContent))}),
                {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
            );
            var kanji = JSON.parse(res.body());
            jpContent = jpContent.map(text => annotate(text, kanji));
        }
        var type = ['6', '8'].includes(get);
        content = jpContent.flatMap((jp, i) => {
            if (!((jp || '').trim() && (cnContent[i] || '').trim())) return [];
            var pair = type ? [cnContent[i], jp] : [jp, cnContent[i]];
            return pair.filter(Boolean).concat(i === jpContent.length - 1 ? [] : '\u200B');
        }).filter(Boolean);
    } else {
        content = jpContent;
    }
}
format(regex(content));
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
var providers = {
    kakuyomu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?kakuyomu\.jp\/works\/(\d+)/,
    syosetu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(ncode|novel18)\.syosetu\.com\/(\w+)/,
    novelup: /(?:https?:\/\/)?novelup\.plus\/story\/(\d+)/,
    hameln: /(?:https?:\/\/)?syosetu\.org\/novel\/(\d+)/,
    pixiv: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/series\/(\d+)|www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/show\.php\?id=(\d+))/,
    alphapolis: /(?:https?:\/\/)?www\.alphapolis\.co\.jp\/novel\/(\d+)\/(\d+)/,
    sakura: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:books\d?\.fishhawk\.top|n\.novelia\.cc)\/(?:api\/)?novel\/(\w+)\/([\w-]+)/
};
var url;
for (var provider in providers) {
    var match = key.match(providers[provider]);
    if (match) {
        var providerId = provider === 'sakura' ? match[1] : provider;
        var novelId = provider === 'alphapolis' ? `${match[1]}-${match[2]}` : provider === 'pixiv' ? (match[3] ? `s${match[3]}` : match[2]) : (match[2] || match[1]);
        url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel/${providerId}/${novelId}`;
        break;
    }
}
if (!url) {
    url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel?page=${page-1}&pageSize=20&query=${key}&provider=kakuyomu,syosetu,novelup,hameln,pixiv,alphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=1`;
}
url;
</js>
variableComment: 输入对应数字刷新即可获取对应文本，{1: "sakura译文", 2: "gpt译文", 3: "有道译文", 4: "百度译文", 5: "原文", 6: "中日对照", 7: "日中对照", 8: "6+平假注音", 9: "7+平假注音"}，默认sakura译文。书籍变量作用于一本书，源变量作用于整个书源，书籍变量优先级高于源变量。

var push = (title, url, style) => {
    discover.push({
        title: title,
        url: url,
        style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: style
        }
    });
};
var addSlots = (count, style) => {
    var remainder = count % 3;
    var slotsAdd = remainder === 0 ? 0 : 3 - remainder;
    for (var i = 0; i < slotsAdd; i++) {
        push("", null, style);
    }
};
push("书架", null, 1);
try {
    var favored = java.ajax(`${baseUrl}/api/user/favored`);
    if (favored.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    	   showR18 = false;
        push("账号未登录", null, 0.25);
        addSlots(1, 0.25);
    } else {
    	   showR18 = true;
    	   push("阅读历史", "/api/user/read-history?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30", 0.25);
        var favoredData = JSON.parse(favored).favoredWeb;
        favoredData.forEach(item => {
            push(item.title, `/api/user/favored-web/${item.id}?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=update`, 0.25);
        });
        addSlots(1 + favoredData.length, 0.25);
    }
} catch (e) {
	   showR18 = false;
    push("未知错误", null, 0.25);
    addSlots(1, 0.25);
}
push("来源", null, 1);
var providers = ["全部", "kakuyomu", "syosetu", "novelup", "hameln", "pixiv", "alphapolis"];
providers.forEach(provider => {
    var url = provider === "全部" ? 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${providers.slice(1).join('%2C')}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0` : 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${provider}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(provider, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(providers.length, 0.25);
push("类型", null, 1);
var types = ["全部", "连载中", "已完结", "短篇"];
types.forEach((type, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=${index}&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(type, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(types.length, 0.25);
push("分级", null, 1);
var levels = showR18 ? ["全部", "一般向", "R18"] : ["全部", "一般向"];
levels.forEach((level, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=${index}&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(level, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(levels.length, 0.25);
push("排序", null, 1);
var sorts = ["更新", "点击"];
sorts.forEach((sort, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=${index}`;
    push(sort, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(sorts.length, 0.25);
JSON.stringify(discover);
</js>

var login = () => {
    var username = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号");
    var password = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码");
    var res = java.post(
        `${baseUrl.replace('n', 'auth')}/api/v1/auth/login`,
        JSON.stringify({
            username: username,
            password: password,
            app: "legado"
        }),
        {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    );

        Authorization: `Bearer ${res.body()}`
    }));
}
login();
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var initUrl = book.bookUrl;
var url = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? initUrl : initUrl.replace('/novel/', '/api/novel/');
var body = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? result : java.ajax(url);
if (body.includes('ID不合适，应当使用')) {
    var match = body.match(/\/\w+\/[\w-]+/);
    url = `${book.origin}/api/novel${match}`;
    body = java.ajax(url);
}
if (body.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    java.toast("当前会话已失效，请重新登录");
}
java.put('url', url);
body;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
var value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
var data = JSON.parse(result);
var cnIntro = data.introductionZh;
var jpIntro = data.introductionJp;
var intro = cnIntro ? (value === '5' ? jpIntro : ['6', '8'].includes(value) ? cnIntro + "\n‎\n" + jpIntro : ['7', '9'].includes(value) ? jpIntro + "\n‎\n" + cnIntro : cnIntro) : jpIntro;
var timeStamp = '{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' || '{{$.syncAt}}';
intro = '  📬最近' + ('{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' ? '更新' : '同步') + '：' + java.timeFormat(timeStamp * 1000) + '\n‎\n' + intro;
intro;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name:

var data = JSON.parse(result);
var name = value === '5' ? data.titleJp : data.titleZh || data.titleJp;
name;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var token = source.getLoginHeader();
update(baseUrl, token);
var value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
var get = /^[1-9]$/.test(value) ? value : '1';
var config = {
    1: 'sakuraParagraphs',
    2: 'gptParagraphs',
    3: 'youdaoParagraphs',
    4: 'baiduParagraphs',
    5: 'paragraphs'
};
var data = JSON.parse(result);
var content = data[config[get]] || data[config[1]] || data[config[2]] || data[config[3]] || data[config[4]] || data[config[5]];
if (['6', '7', '8', '9'].includes(get)) {
    var cnContent = data[config[1]] || data[config[2]] || data[config[3]] || data[config[4]];
    var jpContent = data[config[5]];
    if (cnContent) {
        if (['8', '9'].includes(get)) {
            var res = java.post(
                'https://static.kksk.io/api/kanji',
                JSON.stringify({"content": format(regex(jpContent))}),
                {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
            );
            var kanji = JSON.parse(res.body());
            jpContent = jpContent.map(text => annotate(text, kanji));
        }
        var type = ['6', '8'].includes(get);
        content = jpContent.flatMap((jp, i) => {
            if (!((jp || '').trim() && (cnContent[i] || '').trim())) return [];
            var pair = type ? [cnContent[i], jp] : [jp, cnContent[i]];
            return pair.filter(Boolean).concat(i === jpContent.length - 1 ? [] : '\u200B');
        }).filter(Boolean);
    } else {
        content = jpContent;
    }
}
format(regex(content));
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
var providers = {
    kakuyomu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?kakuyomu\.jp\/works\/(\d+)/,
    syosetu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(ncode|novel18)\.syosetu\.com\/(\w+)/,
    novelup: /(?:https?:\/\/)?novelup\.plus\/story\/(\d+)/,
    hameln: /(?:https?:\/\/)?syosetu\.org\/novel\/(\d+)/,
    pixiv: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/series\/(\d+)|www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/show\.php\?id=(\d+))/,
    alphapolis: /(?:https?:\/\/)?www\.alphapolis\.co\.jp\/novel\/(\d+)\/(\d+)/,
    sakura: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:books\d?\.fishhawk\.top|n\.novelia\.cc)\/(?:api\/)?novel\/(\w+)\/([\w-]+)/
};
var url;
for (var provider in providers) {
    var match = key.match(providers[provider]);
    if (match) {
        var providerId = provider === 'sakura' ? match[1] : provider;
        var novelId = provider === 'alphapolis' ? `${match[1]}-${match[2]}` : provider === 'pixiv' ? (match[3] ? `s${match[3]}` : match[2]) : (match[2] || match[1]);
        url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel/${providerId}/${novelId}`;
        break;
    }
}
if (!url) {
    url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel?page=${page-1}&pageSize=20&query=${key}&provider=kakuyomu,syosetu,novelup,hameln,pixiv,alphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=1`;
}
url;
</js>

<js>
if(/_1.?$/.test(baseUrl)){
	lis=java.get("lis");
	li=org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(lis);
	list=java.getElement(".chapter-list");
	result=li+list;
	}else if(!/_\d+/.test(baseUrl)){
		result="";
		}

	result;
</js>

<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;

var document = JsDom.parse(src);

// 获取列表 第一次需要修改的地方 修改正确的css 选择器
var links = document.select('ul> li');

var list = [];
for (var i =0; i < links.size(); i++) {
    var dd = links.get(i);
    var a = dd.select('a').first(); 
    if (a != null) { 
        list.push({
            text: a.text(),
            id: dd.attr('id').replace('ch', ''), //获取ID属性 需要自己手动改 第二处需要修改的地
            url: a.attr('href')
        });
    } 
}

// 排序
list.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.id, 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.id, 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;


var document = JsDom.parse(src);

//获取列表
var links = document.select('.list_li > li > a');

var list = [];
for (var i = 0; i < links.size(); i++) {
    var link = links.get(i);
    list.push({
        text: link.text(),
        url: link.attr('href')
    });
}

//排序
list.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.text.match(/\d+/)[0], 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.text.match(/\d+/)[0], 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});


java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

<js>
var verify=/请输入验证码/.test(src);
if(verify){
	var url=baseUrl.replace(/captcha=.*$/,"captcha=");
	var link=source.getKey()+"/captcha.php";
	var img=java.getVerificationCode(link);
	result=java.ajax(url+img);
	}else{
		result=result;
		}
	result;
</js>

ruleSearch.author: author
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
JSON.parse(result).data.list.map(o=>{
    var bid = o.id;
    var option = JSON.stringify({'method':'POST','body':'_time=1568281576&_access_token=70c65dcbebf421dbab82e3af6521a051&bookId=' + bid});
    var J = JSON.parse(java.ajax('http://app.quyuedu.hzquyue.com/v2/book.html,'+ option)).data;
    return {
       name:  o.title,
       author:o.nickname,
       tags:  J.category,
       num: J.char_num+'字',
       latest: '第' + J.last_chapter.chapter_num + '章 ' + J.last_chapter.title+String(java.timeFormat(Number(J.last_update_time)*1000)).replace(/(\d+\/\d+\/\d+).*/,'（$1）'),
       intro: o.introduction,
       cover: o.front_cover.replace(/_.*/,'_96x137'),
       catalogUrl: '/book/chapterList.html,'+ option
    }
});
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
  wordCount: parseInt( o('.booktag span:eq(2)').replace('字数：','')/10000) + '万',
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, '') + ' • ' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-'),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('#bookIntro').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
list=[]
lis=java.getElements('class.chapter@tag.li')
var name=""
var surl=""

//获取差值
java.setContent(lis[0],'')
num1=Number(java.getElement('tag.a').attr('href').split('_')[1].replace('.html',''))
java.setContent(lis[2],'')
num2=Number(java.getElement('tag.a').attr('href').split('_')[1].replace('.html',''))
c=(num2-num1)/2
java.log(c)

for(i in lis){
	name=lis[i].text()
	if(/链接已隐藏/.test(lis[i])){
		ur=surl.split('_')
		base=ur[0]
		page1=Number(ur[1].replace('.html',''))+c
		surl=base+'_'+String(page1)+'.html'
		}else{
			java.setContent(lis[i],'')
			surl=java.getElement('tag.a').attr('href')
			}
	temp={
		"name":name,
		"surl":surl
		}
		list.push(temp)
	}
	//java.log(JSON.stringify(list))
	list
</js>

			"surl":surl
			}
			list.push(temp)
		}
		surl=''
	}

	list

ruleContent.content:
<js>
let regex = /var c="([^"]*)"/;
let dd = result.match(regex)[1]

let j = java.base64Decode(dd);
  //java.log(j)
  jja=String(j).replace(/^[^-]*-/,"-")
  if(/=/.test(jja)){jj=jja.replace(/=[^=]*$/,"");}else{jj=jja.replace(/_[^_]*$/,"");}
  
m=jj.replace(/-/g,"PHA+").replace(/_/g,"8L3A+");
n=java.getString("@@.read-content@p!0@html");
n+	java.base64Decode(m)
</js>

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*[\)\}）｝】]/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);

if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString("#novelcontent@html");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");

    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, '') + ' • ' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-'),
	intro: '　　最近更新:' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + o('#intro').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
	url: og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

<js>
page = java.getElement("@@class.last_page");
data = page.attr("href");

ys = data.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1];

if (ys !== null) {
  for (i = 2; i <= ys; i++) {
    list.push({ text: "第" + i + "页", href: baseUrl.replace(/page=1/, "page=" + i) });
  }
}
list;
</js>

ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content}}･{{@@[property$=update_time]@content##\s.*}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

<js>
www="https://m.33yq.com/sort.html";
css="ul.sort>li:nth-child(n+2)>a";
pn="searchPage/&&";
importClass(org.jsoup.Jsoup);
function get(x,y){
list=Jsoup.parse(java.ajax(x)).select(y).toArray().map(a=>String(a.text()).replace(/(\d+)(\D+)/,"$2 | $1本::")+String(a.attr("href")).replace(/1\/$/,pn)).join("");return list};
result=get(www,css)
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
jm=java.base64Decode(java.getString('[name="client"]@content'));
if(jm.length()>1){
var conts = [],list=[];
code=result.match(/codeurl="(\d+)";/)[1];
data=org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
datas=data.select("p[style*='text-indent']");
jm=String(jm).split(/[A-Z]+%/);
for(i=0;i<jm.length;i++){
	k=Math.ceil((i + 1) % parseInt(code));
	j=Math.ceil(jm[i] - k);
	conts[j]=datas[i];
	}
	for(i in conts){
		c=String(conts[i]).replace(/.*本章尚未读完,请.*一页继续阅读.*/g,'');
		list.push(c);
		list.join("\n");
		}
	}else{java.getString(".novelcontent@html")}
</js>
